source_description: Sanitized ToC rule fixture with golden expected output, migrated from legacy Reader-Core samples/fixtures/toc/basic.{html,rule.json,expected.json}. Exercises CSS descendant selectors (#chapter-list .chapter-item), attribute extraction (css:.chapter-link|attr:href), next-page pagination (css:.next-page|attr:href), VIP chapter detection (.vip-tag), and chapter indexing. The golden expected array enables differential testing against the rule engine.
sanitization: All URLs neutralized from relative /chapter-N.html (resolved against example.com) to https://books.example.test/chapter-N.html. Synthetic placeholder content only (测试小说, 测试作者, 测试标题). No real domain, no credentials, no copyrighted text.

privacy_check.notes: Migrated from clean synthetic sample; URLs neutralized. Includes golden expected output for differential testing.
